audit_items.proof_trace: For Fulu states at or after FuluForkEpoch, BeaconProposerIndex correctly returns proposer_lookahead[state.slot % SLOTS_PER_EPOCH] via beaconProposerIndexAtSlotFulu (L329). The guards at L326-328 ensure lookahead is used when valid (Fulu state, epoch >= fork, current/next epoch). Recomputation only occurs for pre-fork epochs or historical queries beyond lookahead coverage, which is correct by design.
